segments.text: Steve's caught up on damage in a flash with that diamond combo!
segments.original_text: スティーブのダイヤコンボであっという間に火力を追いついた

segments.text: Resources may be depleted, but the damage has finally caught up!
segments.original_text: さあ資材こそ枯れているがダメージは追いついたぞとうとう

segments.text: Great utilization of Steve's high-damage KO!
segments.original_text: スティーブの高火力撃墜をうまく活かしたヤマナクション

segments.text: And whiff punishes with the bair!
segments.original_text: そして空中後ろで差し返す

full_text: Steve's caught up on damage in a flash with that diamond combo! Resources may be depleted, but the damage has finally caught up! Great utilization of Steve's high-damage KO! And whiff punishes with the bair!

corrections.original: スティーブの高火力攻撃推をうまく活かした山田クション
corrections.corrected: スティーブの高火力撃墜をうまく活かしたヤマナクション
